symptom_vector: Node memory exhaustion, saturation, high usage, leak, or stress as described in fault_description

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [aiops-k8s-04] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Search for keyword [node_memory_usage_rate] in Metric data for node aiops-k8s-04 during the anomaly time window (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Search for keyword [node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes] in Metric data for node aiops-k8s-04 during the anomaly time window (From GT key_observations)

Step 4: Derive Root Cause - Based on observed anomalies in [node_memory_usage_rate] and [node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes] for node aiops-k8s-04, determined cause is [node_memory_usage_rate] fault (From GT key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Metric value showing high memory usage rate, such as increased median or p99 values compared to normal baseline
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric named [node_memory_usage_rate] associated with node [aiops-k8s-04] in the collected metric data during 2025-06-13T01:10:24Z to 2025-06-13T01:24:24Z

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Metric value indicating low available memory, with significant decrease in median or p99 values from normal baseline
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric named [node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes] associated with node [aiops-k8s-04] in the collected metric data during 2025-06-13T01:10:24Z to 2025-06-13T01:24:24Z
